---
title: "Replication Code and Robustness Checks"
author: Devin Judge-Lord
date: today
format: 
  #pdf: 
  html:
      self-contained: false
      toc: true
      code-fold: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r include=FALSE, cache=FALSE, message=FALSE}
here::here("code", "qmd_global_options.R") |> source() 
type = 4
```

{{< include code/replication.qmd >}}
